name: Luck of the Irish Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place wax paper on tray.
2. In a small saucepan, combine whipping cream, sugar and butter. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture just begins to boil. Remove from heat; immediately add candy bar pieces and vanilla. Stir until chocolate is melted and mixture is well blended.
3. Pour into a 9-inch glass pie plate. Cover; refrigerate several hours or overnight to ripen and harden.
4. Using a spoon, form into 3/4-inch balls, working quickly to prevent melting. Roll in sprinkles. Place on prepared tray.
5. Cover; refrigerate 2 hours or until firm. Store, covered, in refrigerator. About 3-1/2 dozen candies.
